meta.title: Privacy Policy | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Privacy policy for Eagle Logistics website and services.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body: Eagle Logistics ("we", "our") respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our website and services.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We may collect contact details you provide (name, phone, email, shipment details) when you reach out via WhatsApp, email, or our contact channels. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.body: Information is used to provide shipping quotes, facilitate courier bookings through partner networks, respond to inquiries, and improve our services.

sections.title: Third-Party Partners
sections.body: When you ship through Eagle Logistics, your parcel data may be shared with selected courier partners solely for delivery and tracking purposes.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related questions, contact us at hello@eaglelogistics.in or via WhatsApp at the number listed on our Contact page.
